prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `e5790162`.
codex_response:
Implemented `e5790162` end to end. The rule is: start from the lone green `3`, move right through zeros, stop one cell before each marker, turn clockwise on `6`, turn counterclockwise on `8`, and after the last turn continue to the grid edge. `arc2_opus46_summary.json` was used as the starting hint; `arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` was discarded because it misread one example as branching, while the official task is a single non-branching path.

The task package is in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e5790162/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e5790162/verifier.py), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e5790162/generator.py), and [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e5790162/notes.md). No new shared primitive was added. The generator explicitly builds sparse left-edge starts plus singleton `6`/`8` waypoints, with rightward staircase segments and turn lengths that match the official family.

Validation passed:
- Official examples: `6/6` passed via `python -m arc2.shared.verify --task e5790162`
- Generated examples: `1000/1000` passed via `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task e5790162`
- Visual sanity check: [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e5790162/previews/preview_01.png) looks on-family against [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e5790162/previews/originals.png)

Artifacts are here:
